# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## Related Issues

Link issues here (for example: `Closes #123`).

## What Was Tested

- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo tauri build --bundles deb,appimage`
- [ ] Manual app run (`cargo tauri dev`)

If some checks were not run, explain why.

## Runtime Validation (if applicable)

- [ ] Modem detection verified
- [ ] Network connect/disconnect verified
- [ ] SMS flow verified
- [ ] USSD flow verified
- [ ] Call flow verified

## Screenshots / Demo (UI changes)

Attach screenshots or a short recording when the UI is affected.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I followed the [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] I updated docs where needed
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I confirmed no secrets or credentials were committed

## Security Considerations

Note any security-relevant impact (updater, signing, package distribution, permissions, D-Bus access, dependency updates).
